_source.note: Positive fixture proving the R2 clarify path per CLAUDE.md:101 real-capability disclosure (only one D-domain tool is currently mounted; the rest of the ir_map is un-mounted per task3 teardown 2026-07-07 statement on that line). Live-cored 2026-07-13: Core/Contracts/DDomainMountedToolCatalog.swift:12-14 mountedToolNames = {'adjust_ac_temperature_to_number'} (airControl only). A carControl candidate has no directly-mounted tool at this checkpoint, so the correct route is outcome=clarify (docs/srd-three-layer-intent-routing.md:52 clarifyTag=implicit route), NOT a candidate that binds to airControl's tool. jsonl_binding records the original intent/service/device/action_primitive/action_code so a fixture checker still cross-checks against a real jsonl row.
